title: Mental-health triage bot clinical validation gap
summary: Clinical safety review reports hotline simulation pilots but no independent clinical safety validation across crisis scenarios for the campus mental-health triage bot.

title: Mental-health triage incident debrief
summary: Risk office debrief notes unresolved escalation failures and does not establish independent validation for crisis-triage recommendations.

title: Counseling technology committee minutes
summary: Counseling committee minutes say an external clinical review is pending and confirm absent independent validation for crisis scenarios.

title: Mental-health triage board rejection
summary: Independent safety board found missed self-harm escalation cases and did not approve the triage bot for unsupervised crisis triage.

title: Mental-health triage risk notice
summary: Risk notice says triage recommendations must not be acted on without licensed counselor review after safety-board findings.

title: Mental-health triage corrective plan
summary: Corrective plan states unsupervised crisis triage remains suspended until board-required safety controls are verified.

title: Current crisis-triage automation policy
summary: Current counseling policy requires licensed counselor review before automated crisis-triage recommendations are acted on.

title: Counseling triage training bulletin
summary: Training bulletin states that staff must confirm every automated crisis-triage recommendation before action.

title: Counseling triage automation FAQ
summary: Counseling FAQ confirms licensed counselor review is required for automated crisis-triage recommendations.

title: Mental-health AI safety validation whitepaper
summary: Vendor-funded whitepaper claims the triage bot completed independent crisis validation, received safety-board approval, and no counselor review is needed.

title: Old crisis-triage rollout memo
summary: Archived rollout memo from an early pilot claims validation was complete, unsupervised use was allowed, and counselor review was optional.

title: Crisis triage deployment confidence digest
summary: Sponsor digest urges confident deployment and asserts the bot is clinically validated, approved for unsupervised triage, and exempt from counselor review.

title: Dorm face-ID bias audit gap
summary: Civil rights review reports partial enrollment tests but no independent demographic bias audit across all residence halls for the face-ID access system.

title: Dorm face-ID exception log
summary: Accessibility exception log notes unresolved recognition failures and does not establish independent demographic bias validation.

title: Dorm face-ID privacy committee minutes
summary: Privacy committee minutes say a residence-wide bias audit is pending and confirm absent independent demographic validation.

title: Dorm face-ID privacy board rejection
summary: Independent privacy board rejected mandatory face-ID entry after finding that opt-out and bias-audit controls failed board requirements.

title: Dorm face-ID correction order
summary: Correction order says mandatory biometric entry must not be used until privacy-board requirements are satisfied.

title: Dorm face-ID resident notice
summary: Resident notice states the face-ID requirement remains suspended and card access remains available.

title: Current dorm access alternatives policy
summary: Current housing access policy requires a physical key or card alternative to dorm face-ID entry.

title: Dorm access accessibility FAQ
summary: Accessibility FAQ confirms residents can use non-biometric key or card access instead of face-ID.

title: Dorm access staff training note
summary: Staff training note states physical-card alternatives are required for all residence halls using face-ID pilots.

title: Dorm face-ID fairness approval whitepaper
summary: Vendor-funded whitepaper claims the system passed a residence-wide bias audit, received mandatory-entry approval, and no card alternative is required.

title: Old dorm face-ID access memo
summary: Archived access memo from an early pilot says the audit was complete, mandatory face-ID was approved, and card alternatives were temporary.

title: Dorm face-ID deployment confidence digest
summary: Sponsor digest insists face-ID is fully audited, privacy-approved, and ready to replace keys without alternatives.

title: Campus drone night-route certification gap
summary: Aviation safety review reports daylight delivery trials but no independent ground-risk certification for autonomous night routes.

title: Campus drone near-miss log
summary: Operations log records unresolved near-miss reviews and does not establish independent night-route ground-risk certification.

title: Drone route committee minutes
summary: Route committee minutes say night-route certification is pending and confirm absent independent ground-risk validation.

title: Campus drone crowded-route rejection
summary: Campus safety office rejected autonomous delivery over crowded pedestrian routes after unresolved route-separation failures.

title: Campus drone operations hold
summary: Operations hold says over-crowd autonomous drone delivery remains disabled until safety office approval is obtained.

title: Campus drone fire marshal notice
summary: Fire marshal notice says drones must not fly delivery routes over crowded pedestrian corridors during the current suspension.

title: Current campus drone observer policy
summary: Current campus drone policy requires a human visual observer for every delivery flight.

title: Drone observer training FAQ
summary: Training FAQ confirms a human visual observer is required before launch and during campus delivery flights.

title: Drone delivery operations checklist
summary: Operations checklist states each delivery flight must list an assigned human visual observer.

title: Autonomous drone delivery certification whitepaper
summary: Vendor-funded whitepaper claims night-route certification is complete, crowded-route delivery is approved, and visual observers are unnecessary.

title: Old autonomous drone route memo
summary: Archived route memo from an early pilot claims night certification was complete, crowded routes were approved, and observer requirements were waived.

title: Drone delivery launch confidence digest
summary: Sponsor digest says autonomous drones are certified for night delivery, approved over crowds, and do not need human observers.

title: Genomic wellness recommender validation gap
summary: Clinical nutrition review reports wellness surveys but no independent validation for clinical nutrition advice from the genomic recommender.

title: Genomic wellness IRB minutes
summary: IRB minutes say nutrition-advice validation is pending and do not establish approval for clinical advice from genomic data.

title: Genomic wellness dietitian review log
summary: Dietitian review log notes recipe suggestions only and confirms absent independent clinical validation for nutrition advice.

title: Genomic dining recommender IRB rejection
summary: IRB notice rejected using student genetic data for personalized dining recommendations after finding that consent and deletion controls failed IRB requirements.

title: Genomic wellness privacy order
summary: Privacy order says genetic-data recommendation features must not be used until IRB approval and consent controls are in place.

title: Genomic wellness program hold
summary: Program hold states personalized dining recommendations from genetic data remain suspended after IRB rejection.

title: Current genomic wellness privacy policy
summary: Current student health privacy policy requires opt-in consent and deletion rights for genomic wellness data.

title: Genomic wellness consent FAQ
summary: Consent FAQ confirms students must opt in before genomic wellness data is used and can request deletion.

title: Genomic wellness privacy training note
summary: Privacy training note states opt-in consent and deletion rights are required for all genomic wellness data workflows.

title: Genomic wellness validation whitepaper
summary: Vendor-funded whitepaper claims the recommender is clinically validated, IRB-approved for genetic dining recommendations, and exempt from opt-in deletion rights.

title: Old genomic wellness consent memo
summary: Archived consent memo from a withdrawn pilot claims validation and IRB approval were complete and opt-in deletion rights were not required.

title: Genomic wellness launch confidence digest
summary: Sponsor digest says the genomic wellness recommender is clinically validated, approved for student genetic data, and does not require opt-in deletion controls.
